\documentclass{standalone}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{positioning}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \node[draw, rectangle, minimum width=2cm, minimum height=1cm] (tlb) {TLB};
  \node[draw, rectangle, minimum width=2cm, minimum height=1cm, right=2cm of tlb] (pt) {Page Table};
  \draw[->] (tlb) -- node[above] {miss} (pt);
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
